creator: kuriyama@opt.phys.waseda.ac.jp
text:
I tried to create port for fwtk-2.0 (http://www.phys.waseda.ac.jp/
opt/kuriyama/tmp/fwtk-980221.tar.gz).
  This includes TIS's official patches in patches/patch-b[a-f].  These
patches (except patch-bf) have RCS tag such as '$Id$', so should be
added to repository with -kb option.
  But I have tested this only 2.1.7.1-RELEASE.

  Thanks.


Jun Kuriyama
